ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_test_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test data was recorded */,
  "pcr_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of PCR tests conducted */,
  "pcr_pos_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive PCR tests */,
  "pcr_positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate for PCR tests */,
  "ser_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of serological tests conducted */,
  "ser_pos_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive serological tests */,
  "ser_positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate for serological tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "boundaries" TEXT /* Geographical boundaries of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the test center */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the center is located */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the test center */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of tests conducted at the center (PCR or serological) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the test center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the test center */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment details of the test center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_centers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pcr_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PCR test */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test center where the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the PCR test (positive/negative) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was received */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (PCR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pcr_tests_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES test_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "serological_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each serological test */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test center where the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the serological test (positive/negative) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was received */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (serological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_serological_tests_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES test_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the tests were conducted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the tests were conducted */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate for the tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  "accessed_data" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the forecasting model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecasting model */,
  "model_predictions" TEXT /* Predictions made by the forecasting model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario simulation */,
  "simulation_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the scenario simulation */,
  "simulation_results" TEXT /* Results of the scenario simulation */,
  "simulation_visualizations" TEXT /* Visualizations of the scenario simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being shared */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient receiving the data */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was shared */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of data sharing (e.g., full access, restricted access) */,
  "sharing_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of data sharing */,
  "shared_data" TEXT /* Data shared with the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
